note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Pressure Ulcer Left hip measures aprx 4.3 x 5.4cm, depth 0.8cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 2.6x3.2, 0.4cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Left hip / Measures 4.3 cm x 5.4 cm / Stage: Stage 3
Drainage present - serosanguineous, heavy. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
